homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: Does this caption contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (best, completely related)
prompts.1: How complete is the caption with relation to the audio. Consider mood, genre, and instrumentation descriptions. Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, does not contain information) to 7 (best, contains all relevant musical information)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track features a slow tempo driven by a prominent flute alongside keyboard and percussion elements. The combination of steady rhythms and atmospheric textures creates a mystical and tranquil mood ideal for relaxation or meditation.

questions.name: Sample 3
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track relies on synthesized static, white noise, and sound design to create a chaotic and arrhythmic atmosphere. The harsh and abrasive texture evokes a sense of signal interference, making it suitable for experimental films or scenes depicting mechanical decay.

questions.name: Sample 4
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental horror soundtrack establishes a tense and ominous atmosphere through a slow tempo driven by a steady, dark percussive rhythm. A haunting keyboard harmony layers over the sound, creating unease that fits perfectly within the cinematic style of this experimental electronic piece. The composition effectively builds suspense, serving as an ideal backdrop for dramatic scenes in films or video games.

questions.name: Sample 6
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental techno track relies heavily on synthesizers, a driving bassline, and repetitive electronic drums to create an energetic atmosphere. The dark and intense mood generates a sense of urgency that is well-suited for a nightclub or rave environment where the pulsating beats can immerse listeners in a hypnotic experience.

These sonic elements combine to form a classic example of electronic music designed for dance floors or raves.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental hip-hop track centers on a repetitive drum machine loop that creates an infectious, steady groove. Occasional claps and fills punctuate the beat, reinforcing the chill yet energetic atmosphere suitable for relaxed gatherings or background music. The sound blends electronic percussion with subtle synth elements to evoke a nostalgic, laid-back vibe reminiscent of classic lounge jams.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
